session.user: Run `ty check src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/impl_reset.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py` and report the full output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/impl_reset.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py

session.assistant:
ty passed: All checks passed!
